desc:
At the end of this hallway, a group of researchers is having a discussion in front of an unnaturally dark place.

Noticing our presence, their faces brighten up as they approach us.

"Please, will you investigate this area ahead for us?"

"We will help with the best of our abilities should you accept."

options.messageDesc:
Heal all allies
Run a Pride & Envy Advantage check to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.

result:
"Fine, walk away."

"We're not the ones losing out on a good deal."

The researchers all turned around without a moment's hesitation.

1.title: Accept and investigate.
successDesc:
"I love to see some proper enthusiasm. Yes... I like your attitude. Take this with you."

"It'll help you in your investigations."

After handing us the gear, the researchers walked up to the Sinners and began examining them.

Once they were finished, the Sinners were all in tip-top shape again.
failureDesc:
"At least try to feign some enthusiasm, why don't you?"

"Well, we'll at least make sure that you're fully recovered. Don't look so disgruntled about it."

The researchers walked up to the Sinners and began examining them.

Once they were finished, the Sinners were all in tip-top shape again.
